epistemology: 7 direct-port legacy seeds promoted after CMPLX-Standards gate validation.

seeds.title: TMN mint, wallet, and label economy lineage
seeds.port_rationale: Existing implementation or document can be reused after normal review.
seeds.rationale: Label-to-coin matching, shell weights, escrow, citation boosts, wallets, and receipt chains are already implemented across TMN-main and PartsFactory.

seeds.title: MMDB, MDHG, SpeedLight, and populated atom corpus
seeds.port_rationale: Existing implementation or document can be reused after normal review.
seeds.rationale: CMPLXUNI contributes a populated 23k atom/receipt corpus and clean MMDB contracts; DevKit adds a stdlib MDHG geometric cache.

seeds.title: E8, Leech, Golay, and Niemeier lattice primitives
seeds.port_rationale: Existing implementation or document can be reused after normal review.
seeds.rationale: Multiple repos contain reusable E8 roots, Leech/Golay code towers, Niemeier ledgers, and project-to-Leech helpers.

seeds.title: Repo kernel, forms, provenance, and harvest dossiers
seeds.port_rationale: Existing implementation or document can be reused after normal review.
seeds.rationale: Repo forms and dossiers already provide a provenance map for older findings and a route for binding code evidence into CAM review objects.

seeds.title: Formal suite validators and theorem acceptance records
seeds.port_rationale: Existing implementation or document can be reused after normal review.
seeds.rationale: Formalization provides the theorem registry, intake protocol, proof/open-obligation discipline, and verifier references needed by CMPLX-Standards.

seeds.title: Rule30/J3(O)/Lucas proof-grade lattice_forge spine
seeds.port_rationale: Existing implementation or document can be reused after normal review.
seeds.rationale: R30 contains the proof-grade Rule30, Lucas, J3(O), exact-rational S3/F4 closure, lattice-code, theorem-registry, and oracle-data spine.

seeds.title: PartsFactory lattice-forge runtime and service validators
seeds.port_rationale: Existing implementation or document can be reused after normal review.
seeds.rationale: The current PartsFactory checkout holds the serviceable lattice-forge runtime, testkit MCP, proof lab, and repo-kernel tools.
